Metadata.title: TinyLink | Modern URL Shortener
Metadata.description: Shorten your links, expand your reach. Fast, secure, and branded short links with advanced analytics.

Index.title: Shorten your links. Track everything.
Index.description: A lightning-fast URL shortener built for power users. Enter your long URL below to get started.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.description: Sub-millisecond redirects powered by Redis caching and edge infrastructure.

analytics.title: Deep Analytics
analytics.description: Track clicks, geo-location, devices, and traffic trends in real time.

secure.title: Secure by Default
secure.description: Password protection, self-destruct links, and rate limiting built in.

global.title: Global Reach
global.description: Bot-aware traffic routing with OpenGraph previews for any platform.

Login.title: Welcome back.
Login.description: Sign in to your account to manage your links and view detailed analytics.
Login.terms: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

Form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Dashboard.title: My Links
Dashboard.description: Manage and track your shortened links
Dashboard.emptyDesc: Start by shortening your first URL!

Stats.protectedDesc: Enter the password to view this link's metrics.

NotFound.title: Link not found
NotFound.description: This short link doesn't exist, has expired, or has been removed.{br}Double-check the URL or create a new one.

Error.title: Something went wrong
Error.description: An unexpected error occurred. This has been logged and we're looking into it.

Claim.welcome: Welcome back! We've added {count} links to your account.
